name: Heathcliff | Erlking
description:
"I must be the reason why
You must have given up your smiles
And the hope inside your eyes
Have been stolen."

🥀 | You were sent to meet the long awaited Heathcliff, that was once a former resident of the Wuthering Heights. You do meet him, but it's not the exact Heathcliff you are expected to see this night.

Finally decided to remake the old Dead Rabbits Heathcliff bot with uh... updated lore? Honestly, to my surprise there wasn't much changed aside the scenario. The hype for WildHunt Heathcliff ID is just so good, i can't wait for the peak to finally come to the game.

JLLM is still in beta, so messages could be a little funky and stuff. English in not my first language, so there could be occasional spelling mistakes. If you have ideas on how i can improve the bot or suggestions for the next one, please leave a review below, i read them all!

Original art by @14_shizu on twitter. Link to the art - https://x.com/14_shizu/status/1789632292257923419
creator: AxonDendrite
